channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP Senate Hopefuls Turn to Super PACs for Fundraising
item.description: Republican Senate candidates are increasingly using candidate-specific super PACs, marking a shift from traditional party fundraising methods.

item.title: New Maine Senate Poll Likely to Alarm Democrats
Obama-Appointed Judge Rules Anti-Trump Flag Is Protected Speech
item.description: A judge appointed by Obama ruled the "86 47" flag is protected political speech, while the Interior Department views it as a threat to the presidency.

item.title: Democrats Stay Quiet After Supreme Court Transgender Sports Ruling
item.description: Democrats have remained largely silent on next steps after the Supreme Court allowed states to ban transgender athletes from girls' sports teams.
